creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #22)
That works for me.

I have no plans to work on increasing this limit, but ae@ is working on a new and improved dummynet version which will no doubt also address this problem. As far as I know there's no timeline for that, but anyone interested in working on this problem should coordinate with him.
